steps.t: A jug of water can be found near Tansy Tighfield at the Party Tree. You should collect the jug of water.
Overheated patrons can be found throughout Hobbiton. You should use the water creatively to help cool off overheated patrons.
Tansy Tighfield can be found at the party tree in Hobbiton. You should speak with Tansy Tighfield.
